message:
e2e: Fix dashboard navigation test to not trigger SSR errors

Change the test to verify link href attribute instead of clicking and
navigating. The test factory seeds DB records but not R2 data, so
navigating to the transcript page triggers a 500 error that corrupts
the SSR state and causes subsequent tests to hang.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/dc7812e4-7f8d-4ef0-954e-7f8c9be9dfa5
